profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Vastland Indonesia Tbk is involved in the construction and rental of warehouses in Indonesia. It operates built-to-suit warehouses for various industries, including fast-moving consumer goods, beverages, commodities trading, 3PL providers, pharmaceutical distributors, electronics, and e-commerce; and general warehouses. The company was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Bandar Lampung, Indonesia. PT Vastland Indonesia Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Tembesu Elang Perkasa.
